{
 "cells": [

   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "e696ea42-1b83-44c5-97ae-a00e6152f26c",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "# Lectura y graficación de una señal almacenada en un archivo txt"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 1,
   "id": "5c19e590-2f0b-48fe-957b-9fa8ee71c36a",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "import numpy as np\n",
    "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
    "import pandas as pd\n",
    "import seaborn as sns\n",
    "import re"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "1127761c-0445-417a-aa31-fe31ae31bec5",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## Abrimos el archivo txt para ver  el contenido"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 2,
   "id": "083a298d-f3b9-4ef5-a6a2-c245e36f4744",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "text/plain": [
       "'Fs=100\\n'"
      ]
     },
     "execution_count": 2,
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "execute_result"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "f = open(\"señal mano.txt\",\"r\")\n",
    "raw_data = f.readline()  # con f.read() leemos todo el contenido\n",
    "f.close()\n",
    "\n",
    "raw_data"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 3,
   "id": "8e742f1e-5c45-4507-92c1-b9e6407e94c5",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [
    {
     "name": "stdout",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "['100']\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "## Expresion regular para buscar automaticamente el contenido de un numero dentro de un string\n",
    "x = re.findall(\"[0-5][0-9]\\d\", raw_data)\n",
    "\n",
    "print(x)"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 4,
   "id": "ec8117a8-3b47-4ab8-8345-8553d97b585e",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [
    {
     "name": "stdout",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      " Fs=100.0 hz\n",
      " Ts=0.01 s\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "Fs = float(x[0])\n",
    "Ts=1/Fs\n",
    "\n",
    "print(f\" Fs={Fs} hz\\n Ts={Ts} s\")"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "6c932f17-88c4-43dd-9831-233bdb8eeadd",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## Leemos el archivo excluyendo las 2 primeras filas del archivo"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 5,
   "id": "b2f14117-a81f-4bd6-bde1-6d2fccdd3e3b",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "text/plain": [
       "array([[ 0.00000000e+00, -5.90117253e+00],\n",
       "       [ 1.00000000e-02, -5.90117253e+00],\n",
       "       [ 2.00000000e-02,  6.09882747e+00],\n",
       "       ...,\n",
       "       [ 5.96700000e+01,  1.20988275e+01],\n",
       "       [ 5.96800000e+01,  1.09882747e+00],\n",
       "       [ 5.96900000e+01, -6.90117253e+00]])"
      ]
     },
     "execution_count": 5,
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "execute_result"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "array = np.genfromtxt(\"./señal mano.txt\", delimiter=\",\",skip_header = 2)\n",
    "array[:,1]= array[:,1] - np.mean(array[:,1])\n",
    "array"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "b2db85ae-94c7-4451-b4bb-328e948a91ca",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## Ploteamos la lectura"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 6,
   "id": "396ca0aa-1f67-4da2-b91b-f20dd27d9c9d",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 640x480 with 1 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    },
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 640x480 with 1 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    },
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 640x480 with 1 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    },
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 640x480 with 1 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "plt.plot(array[:,0], array[:,1], label=\"señal\")      # graficamos la señal\n",
    "plt.grid(linestyle=\":\")\n",
    "plt.xlabel(\"Tiempo (s)\")\n",
    "plt.ylabel(\"Voltaje (mV)\")\n",
    "plt.legend(loc=\"upper right\")\n",
    "plt.xlim([3,16])\n",
    "#plt.ylim([-100,100])\n",
    "plt.title(\"Señal en reposo\")\n",
    "plt.show()\n",
    "\n",
    "plt.plot(array[:,0], array[:,1], label=\"señal\")      # graficamos la señal\n",
    "plt.grid(linestyle=\":\")\n",
    "plt.xlabel(\"Tiempo (s)\")\n",
    "plt.ylabel(\"Voltaje (mV)\")\n",
    "plt.legend(loc=\"upper right\")\n",
    "plt.xlim([18,28])\n",
    "#plt.ylim([-100,100])\n",
    "plt.title(\"Señal en flexión leve\")\n",
    "plt.show()\n",
    "\n",
    "plt.plot(array[:,0], array[:,1], label=\"señal\")      # graficamos la señal\n",
    "plt.grid(linestyle=\":\")\n",
    "plt.xlabel(\"Tiempo (s)\")\n",
    "plt.ylabel(\"Voltaje (mV)\")\n",
    "plt.legend(loc=\"upper right\")\n",
    "plt.xlim([28,38])\n",
    "#plt.ylim([-100,100])\n",
    "plt.title(\"Señal en flexión brusca\")\n",
    "plt.show()\n",
    "\n",
    "plt.plot(array[:,0], array[:,1], label=\"señal\")      # graficamos la señal\n",
    "plt.grid(linestyle=\":\")\n",
    "plt.xlabel(\"Tiempo (s)\")\n",
    "plt.ylabel(\"Voltaje (mV)\")\n",
    "plt.legend(loc=\"upper right\")\n",
    "plt.xlim([37,50])\n",
    "#plt.ylim([-100,100])\n",
    "plt.title(\"Señal en contracción isométrica\")\n",
    "plt.show()"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "558ee91d-87cc-4d22-9157-e7308e04a6d0",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## La forma de sabes la frecuencia de la señal es viendo en el dominio de la frecuencia"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 7,
   "id": "bfccc2ff-aeae-4d2c-93fa-f915925ec06d",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 640x480 with 1 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "N = 2**10                                     # 10 bits, 0-1023\n",
    "\n",
    "signal1 = array[:,1]\n",
    "\n",
    "signal_fft = np.fft.fft(signal1, N)           # fft magtinud\n",
    "signal_fft = np.round(np.abs(signal_fft),3)[0:N//2] # nos quedamos con los componente de la derecha de la FFT\n",
    "signal_aux = signal_fft/signal_fft.max()     # hallamos el maximo para pasar la magnitud a escala db\n",
    "\n",
    "with np.errstate(divide='ignore'):\n",
    "    signal_fft_db = 10*np.log10(signal_aux)  # , out=signal_aux, where=signal_aux >= 0 para evitar division por zero\n",
    "\n",
    "F_list = np.linspace(0,Fs/2, N//2)\n",
    "F = np.round(F_list[np.argmax(signal_fft_db)], 1)   # argmax, encuentra el argumento max en un array\n",
    "\n",
    "plt.plot(F_list, signal_fft_db)  #10 * np.log10(P / Pref) , decibelios\n",
    "plt.text(F,0, f\"{F}Hz\")\n",
    "plt.grid(linestyle=\":\")\n",
    "plt.ylabel(\"Magnitud (db)\")\n",
    "plt.xlabel(\"Frecuencias (Hz)\")\n",
    "plt.title(\"FFT en el decibelios\")\n",
    "plt.xlim([0,50])\n",
    "plt.xticks(np.arange(0,50,10))\n",
    "plt.show()"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": null,
   "id": "bf35e255-50d0-4169-acff-9d64c1ff42fc",
